verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, Hallelujah, hallelujah.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus, Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus, Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus, Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How I love Him, how I love Him, How I love Him, how I love Him, How I love Him, how I love Him, How I love Him, how I love Him.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus, Thank you Jesus.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I love You, Jesus, I love You, Jesus I love You, Jesus, I love You, Jesus I love You, Jesus, I love You, Jesus I love You, Jesus, I love You, Jesus

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Lord, I love You Lord, I love You Lord, I love You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord, We praise Thee Lord, We praise Thee Lord, We praise Thee Lord, We praise Thee
